scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix Backend && npm install --prefix Frontend && npm install --prefix teams-bot/odin
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -k -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,BOT" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold" "npm run dev:backend:with-db" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:bot"
scripts.dev:backend:with-db: npm run dev:db && npm run dev:backend
